query_intent: For 1998 catalog sales to female customers with advanced degrees and selected birth months in selected states, compute grouped averages of sales/customer metrics with rollups over item and geography.

dag_nodes.intent: Join catalog sales to item, date, customer, two demographic roles, and address; enforce demographic, birth-month, year, and state filters; then compute average metric columns and output ROLLUP totals across item/country/state/county.
